dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6099 IH: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 2200 South Salina Street in Syracuse, New York, as the “Wallie Howard Jr. Post Office Building”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Mannion (for himself, Mr. LaLota, Mr. Garbarino, Mr. Suozzi, Ms. Gillen, Ms. Meng, Ms. Velázquez, Mr. Goldman of New York, Mr. Nadler, Ms. Ocasio-Cortez, Mr. Torres of New York, Mr. Latimer, Mr. Riley of New York, Mr. Tonko, Mr. Langworthy, Ms. Tenney, Mr. Morelle, and Mr. Kennedy of New York) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 2200 South Salina Street in Syracuse, New York, as the Wallie Howard Jr. Post Office Building.

section.header: Wallie Howard Jr. Post Office Building

subsection.text: The facility of the United States Postal Service located at 2200 South Salina Street in Syracuse, New York, shall be known and designated as the Wallie Howard Jr. Post Office Building.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the facility referred to in subsection (a) shall be deemed to be a reference to the Wallie Howard Jr. Post Office Building.
